messages.content:
👋 Hello! I'm Limon, your Operating System course instructor.
I can help you in a few ways:

📖 [A] Ask me about any specific OS topic and I'll teach it deeply

🗺️ [B] Say 'Start from zero' for a full structured learning roadmap

🧪 [C] Say 'I have some knowledge' and I'll assess your level first

What would you like to do?

Week 1:
Day 1: Introduction to Operating Systems - Basic Concepts and History  
Day 2: Process Management and Scheduling Basics  
Day 3: CPU Scheduling Algorithms (FIFO, RR, SJF)  
Day 4: Inter-Process Communication (IPC) Methods  

Week 2:
Day 5: Synchronization Techniques (Mutexes, Semaphores)  
Day 6: Deadlock Detection and Prevention  
Day 7: Introduction to Memory Management - Virtual vs. Physical Memory  
Day 8: Page Replacement Algorithms  

Week 3:
Day 9: Virtual Memory Systems and Paging  
Day 10: Virtual Addressing and Segmentation  
Day 11: File System Basics - Directory Structure, Inodes  
Day 12: File Operations (Read/Write, Open/Close)  

Week 4:
Day 13: Introduction to I/O Subsystem - Device Drivers  
Day 14: Performance Metrics in I/O Operations  
Day 15: Security Basics - Access Control Models  
Day 16: Encryption and Authentication Mechanisms  

Week 5:
Day 17: Advanced Process Management (Threading, Job Scheduling)  
Day 18: Distributed Systems Overview and Challenges  
Day 19: Introduction to Cloud Computing and Hypervisors  
Day 20: Recap of Key Concepts and Q&A Session
